zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.Elmstead, Essex, England: 英國艾可艾爾姆斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Drake於大約1579年出生在英國英格蘭艾可艾爾姆斯亞德時，她的父親William Drake Jr27歲，母親Joan Merrylls23歲。她於1600年12月7日與John Bland在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年7月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.Elmstead, Essex, England: 英国艾可艾爾姆斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Drake于大约1579年出生在英国英格兰艾可艾爾姆斯亞德时，她的父亲William Drake Jr27岁，母亲Joan Merrylls23岁。她于1600年12月7日与John Bland在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福萊斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年7月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Drake was born about 1579, in Elmstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Drake Jr, was 27 and her mother, Joan Merrylls, was 23. She married John Bland on 7 December 1600, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 July 1639, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Drake est née environ 1579, à Elmstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Drake Jr, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Merrylls, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Bland le 7 décembre 1600, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juillet 1639, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lei sposato John Bland il 7 dicembre 1600, nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Drakeが約1579年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエルムステアドで生まれた時，父William Drake Jrは27歳，母Joan Merryllsは23歳であった。1600年12月7日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンでJohn Blandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年7月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Drake(이)가 대략 1579년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 엘스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Drake Jr(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Merrylls(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1600년 12월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 John Bland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 7월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Drake nasceu aproximadamente 1579, em Elmstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Drake Jr, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Merrylls, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bland em 7 de dezembro de 1600, em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de julho de 1639, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Drake родилась около 1579 г. в местности элмстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Drake Jr было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Merrylls, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bland 7 декабря 1600 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 июля 1639 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con John Bland el 7 de diciembre de 1600, en Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1639, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
